description: CompositionWhite round neck jersey made of PES, with short sleeves and adidas patent stripes across the shouldersFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoWith this Climalite enabled jersey, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics, this jersey keeps your body dry by drawing sweat away from your body helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. On an off day, pair it with adidas shorts and chappals for a uber cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jerseysHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
